notes: This manifest identifies the official source package for the first real-data jurisdiction.
First verified local EU tariff rows are now committed for HS 8208.30 and HS 0901.21.
Coverage remains intentionally partial and is not yet a production-grade EU tariff schedule.

artifacts.description: Raw official Access2Markets tariff payloads captured for the first verified EU rows.
Normalized EU tariff records currently preferred by the backend for matching EU lookups.

sources.name: Access2Markets tariff endpoint
sources.purpose: Official EU tariff/measure payload used for the first normalized European Union lookup rows.

sources.name: EU Customs Tariff (TARIC) overview
sources.purpose: Primary tariff-system reference and entry point for EU tariff consultation and raw-data guidance.

sources.name: Combined Nomenclature
sources.purpose: Official nomenclature reference for goods classification and annual code structure updates.

sources.name: Tariff classification of goods
sources.purpose: Classification guidance context for EU customs treatment.

sources.name: EU Binding Tariff Information (BTI)
sources.purpose: Classification certainty reference for difficult product-description-to-code cases.
